scripts.dev:subject: npm run dev -w services/subject
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently --names auth,acad-yr,config,subject,teacher,class,assign,timetable,dashboard,export,ws --prefix-colors blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white,red,gray,blueBright,greenBright,yellowBright "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:academic-year" "npm run dev:school-config" "npm run dev:subject" "npm run dev:teacher" "npm run dev:class" "npm run dev:assignment" "npm run dev:timetable" "npm run dev:dashboard" "npm run dev:export" "npm run dev:websocket"
scripts.dev:all: npm run build:shared && concurrently --names auth,acad-yr,config,subject,teacher,class,assign,timetable,dashboard,export,ws,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white,red,gray,blueBright,greenBright,yellowBright,cyanBright "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:academic-year" "npm run dev:school-config" "npm run dev:subject" "npm run dev:teacher" "npm run dev:class" "npm run dev:assignment" "npm run dev:timetable" "npm run dev:dashboard" "npm run dev:export" "npm run dev:websocket" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.deploy:frontend: cd apps/frontend && npm run build && aws s3 sync dist/ s3://timetable-prod-frontend --delete && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id EUWIXJK2BNYEF --paths '/*'
scripts.deploy:frontend:prod: cd apps/frontend && npx vite build --mode production && aws s3 sync dist/ s3://timetable-prod-frontend --delete && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id EUWIXJK2BNYEF --paths '/*'
scripts.deploy:frontend:dev: cd apps/frontend && npx vite build --mode staging && aws s3 sync dist/ s3://timetable-dev-frontend --delete && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id EHYD0FQL3TM93 --paths '/*'
scripts.deploy:service: cd services/$npm_config_svc && npx serverless deploy --stage prod
scripts.health:check:prod: bash -c 'for ep in auth dashboard teachers subjects classes academic-years config export timetables; do echo -n "$ep: "; curl -s https://d25i05v9hwcs8q.cloudfront.net/api/$ep/health; echo; done'
scripts.health:check:dev: bash -c 'for ep in auth dashboard teachers subjects classes academic-years config export timetables; do echo -n "$ep: "; curl -s https://dhx488d27udyg.cloudfront.net/api/$ep/health; echo; done'
